👇 Everything we curated for this Iran episode. Books, history, cookbooks, cultural resources.

*📚 BROWSE THE IRAN COLLECTION*
  ◦ Every book, cookbook, and cultural item we'd recommend for this episode → https://amzn.to/3Pq9wPW

*🛍 SEE OUR FULL W.O.E. STOREFRONT*
  ◦ Every destination Collection in one place → https://www.amazon.com/shop/whereonearth

*📚 GO DEEPER INTO IRAN*
  ◦ A History of Iran: Empire of the Mind by Michael Axworthy → https://amzn.to/4wVqXZp
  ◦ All the Shah's Men by Stephen Kinzer → https://amzn.to/4vffHp6

*📖 IRANIAN VOICES*
  ◦ The Complete Persepolis by Marjane Satrapi → https://amzn.to/43ApWbE
  ◦ Reading Lolita in Tehran by Azar Nafisi → https://amzn.to/4uUuBS5

*🍲 BRING IRAN HOME*
  ◦ Food of Life by Najmieh Batmanglij → https://amzn.to/3RzBI3o
  ◦ The Essential Rumi translated by Coleman Barks → https://amzn.to/4vewSXY
